exercises.title: Parameter Set Analysis
exercises.description: Analyze the 12 SLH-DSA parameter sets and their tradeoffs.
tasks: Create table of all 12 parameter sets
Recommend parameters for different use cases
hints: Parameters vary by hash, security level, and fast/small tradeoff

exercises.title: Use Case Mapping
exercises.description: Map SLH-DSA to appropriate real-world use cases.
hints: Consider signature size tolerance and security requirements

exercises.title: Hypertree Structure
exercises.description: Document how SLH-DSA's hypertree construction works.
hints: Each layer reduces the number of one-time signatures needed

exercises.title: Stateless vs Stateful
exercises.description: Compare SLH-DSA (stateless) with XMSS (stateful) hash-based signatures.
tasks: Explain why state management is challenging
hints: Stateful schemes have smaller signatures but require careful state management
